untranslatable_reason: Signal requires identification of candlestick 'breakout' event and comparison of candle height to 'median percentage of breakout price' — neither breakout detection nor median-relative metrics are available in the allowed indicator set. The measure rule (candle height / 6) cannot be directly expressed without a custom breakout detector. Entry conditions are inherently pattern-based and require multi-candle analysis not available in single-bar indicators.
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation using range (candle height proxy) and returns for exit targets based on provided performance data (4.15% average rise for short candles in scenario 1). Pattern detection and breakout identification require custom logic outside standard technical indicators. Direction set to CONTEXT_DEPENDENT per original signal specification.
